mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 230 in CPIAUCSL triggers central bank rate hikes, increasing discount rates and reducing equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite inflationary signal, or CPIAUCSL fails to predict rate hikes within 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in INDPRO and HOUST signal weakening industrial activity and housing demand, creating downside risk for equity markets and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns exceed 5% in 40%+ of instances where both INDPRO and HOUST decline, or the correlation between proxies and SPX falls below 0.25.

mechanism_narrative: A labor market tightening indicated by UNRATE below 8% combined with rising PAYEMS signals inflationary pressures, prompting monetary policy hawkishness and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of instances where both UNRATE < 8% and PAYEMS > 130,000, or the interaction effect loses statistical significance (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth (GDPC1) combined with rising RSAFS indicates robust consumer demand, driving corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns fall below 2% in 60%+ of instances where both GDPC1 and RSAFS show positive momentum, or the interaction effect breaks down (IC < 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in INDPRO signals deteriorating industrial output, creating recession risks that depress equity valuations and produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns exceed 4% in 50%+ of instances where INDPRO declines, or the signal's IC drops below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in UNRATE above 9% indicates labor market deterioration, increasing recession probabilities and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of instances where UNRATE > 9%, or the signal's predictive power vanishes (IC < 0.03).

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts (HOUST) combined with strong GDP growth (GDPC1) signals expanding demand, driving corporate revenues and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns fall below 3% in 50%+ of instances where both HOUST and GDPC1 rise, or the interaction effect becomes non-significant (p > 0.15).
